content.text:
Introduction to Drawing

Drawing is a form of visual art in which an artist uses instruments to mark paper or other two-dimensional surfaces to create images.

What You'll Learn:

  • Basic drawing techniques
  • Understanding shapes and forms
  • Shading and light
  • Creating your first sketches

Key Concepts:

  • Line - The basic element of drawing
  • Shape - Two-dimensional forms
  • Form - Three-dimensional shapes
  • Value - Lightness or darkness of tones
content.task: Draw basic shapes: circle, square, triangle, and rectangle
